Interface BrowserFilterItemBank

All Superinterfaces:
Bank<BrowserFilterItem>, BrowserItemBank<BrowserFilterItem>, HardwareBindable, ObjectProxy, RelativeHardwarControlBindable, Scrollable, Subscribable
public interface BrowserFilterItemBank extends BrowserItemBank<BrowserFilterItem>
Instances of this interface are used to navigate a filter column in the Bitwig Studio browser.
Since:
API version 1
